market_pulse: EDC Week peak activity: LIV/Beach capitalizing with mega talent (Tiesto, David Guetta, John Summit), Encore competing aggressively (Calvin Harris, Marshmello), and Omnia Dayclub opening May 15 creating new competitive pressure on weekend pool scene.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: LIV Beach booked with top-tier talent
New Omnia Dayclub opening May 15 diverts flow
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Double down on UGC capture, Stories momentum (countdown + BTS), Story takeovers from guest talent. Consider flash 48hr promo for Mon/Tues bridge (post-EDC hangover recovery angle).

content_gaps.description: WAX MOTIF tech-house residency at Zouk (May 16), NOIZU at Ayu (May 15) generating trending audio tags on TT. LIV not surfacing equivalent tech-house content.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Acquire tech-house remix/mashup content from guest DJs this weekend; post Stories with trending audio tags (#WAXMOTIF, #TechHouse). Consider booking complementary tech-house talent for June.

content_gaps.description: TAO Beach heavily marketing 'bachelorette party oasis' messaging. LIV/Encore not matching this niche angle despite strong daytime capacity.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 3-5 bachelorette group UGC clips; retarget engaged females 21-35 on TT with bride/squad content. Test 'Bride Oasis' hashtag angle.

content_gaps.description: Encore consistently posting high-engagement bottle service/cabana content (282K followers). LIV Beach at 40K has lower visual polish on bottle moments.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Shoot 3-4 premium bottle service moments (tower setup, champagne cascades, VIP ambiance). Post Sat/Sun as carousel + Reels on IG @livbeach.

influencer_activity.mention: Posted 'Looks so good makes no sense #livbeach' — appears to be guest/regular creator capturing organic moment at LIV Beach on Disco Lines day.
Booked SUN May 17 at LIV Beach (per @livbeach post). High-engagement talent; expect organic fan posts + retweets.
Dual bookings: SUN May 18 LIV Nightclub + SAT May 16 LIV Beach. Major pull; grammy-winning presence. Fontainebleau exclusive 2025-2026 partnership.
SAT May 16 LIV Nightclub (EDC Week closer). Mid-tier EDM talent with engaged following.
FRI May 15 LIV Nightclub. World-class mega-talent; high organic reach expected.

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Organic mention detected; micro-tier engagement. Nurture for repeat posts.
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_approach: DM with behind-scenes content, offer small gift/comp next visit.

liv_outreach_targets.reason: VFX/video content creator trending on TT for nightlife footage. Complement to LIV's visual brand.
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_approach: Sponsor Story takeover or provide early access for UGC recording.

Pre-opening (May 15) flash promo likely. New venue = high urgency for launch marketing.

User-generated content: attendees posting day-of outfits and John Summit anticipation for LIV Beach.

venues.summary: All-new day oasis positioning. Weekend talent locked: Knock2 (5/14), DiscoLines (5/15), David Guetta (5/16), John Summit (5/17). Strong 40K IG following, driving pool party narrative.

DiscoLines day UGC: attendee post 'Looks so good makes no sense #livbeach'. Organic user content.
Outfits & dress code guides trending for LIV Beach (bootcut jeans, bikini tops, heels angle).

venues.summary: Resident DJ program strong (Chainsmokers, Diplo, Dillon Francis, Marshmello, Gryffin). May event calendar active but posts lower frequency vs. competitors.

raw_posts.content_summary: Event calendar active for May, resident DJ roster promoted. Venue calendar updated but no urgent talent announcements this cycle.

venues.summary: Premium positioning: 282K IG followers. Weekend slate: Subtronics (5/14), Gryffin (5/15), Calvin Harris (5/16), Marshmello (5/17). High-polish bottle service content. Strong engagement baseline.

Bottle service + cabana content; champagne tower setups. High-engagement visual content (3,886 total posts).
Guest list promotions via @encorebeachclubguestlist account. Organic secondary channel (4,791 followers).

venues.summary: Memorial Day Weekend lineup: Zedd (5/22), Steve Aoki (5/23), DJ Pauly D (5/24). Sister venue OMNIA Dayclub opens May 15 at Caesars — new competitive threat. Heavy promotional activity expected.

raw_posts.content_summary: Memorial Day Weekend mega-lineup: Zedd FRI 5/22, Steve Aoki SAT 5/23, DJ Pauly D SUN 5/24. Premium pricing expected.
OMNIA Dayclub opening announcement May 15 at Caesars Palace. 46,000 sq ft new dayclub = competitive threat to LIV Beach, Encore, TAO.

venues.summary: OMNIA Dayclub & Skybar OPENS MAY 15 at Caesars Palace. 46,000 sq ft new luxury dayclub + rooftop. Opening promo content expected high frequency this week. Major competitive threat to existing dayclubs.

raw_posts.content_summary: Official opening May 15, 2026. Described as 'new upscale daytime and rooftop entertainment destination' with world-class DJs, VIP cabanas, poolside bottle service. Set to 'raise the bar for pool parties.'

venues.summary: WAX MOTIF tech-house takeover 5/16. Mathame residency (multi-date). Strong EDC Week positioning. Trending audio: tech-house. Lower social follower count vs. Strip majors but solid event calendar.

raw_posts.content_summary: WAX MOTIF tech-house specialist Saturday 5/16. Generating trending audio on TikTok; aligned with broader tech-house resurgence.
Mathame first-ever Las Vegas DJ residency announced at Zouk + Ayu. Multi-date commitment signals venue confidence in artist brand.

venues.summary: May lineup: Murda Beatz (5/16), DJ Franzen (5/27), TELYKAST (5/28), Justin Credible (5/29). Hip-hop + electronic mix. Lower organic social presence than Wynn-based competitors.

Band Sintown listings show Steve Aoki + DJ Drama on 2026-2027 schedule. Generic promotional content.

venues.summary: Palm Tree Beach Club (MGM Grand) repositioned as premium dayclubcompleted renovation. Memorial Day weekend: Kygo (5/23), Alesso, Zedd bookings. Fresh competitive alternative to aging dayclubs.

Feature: 'Palm Tree Beach Club is a fully reimagined oasis featuring headliners like Kygo, Alesso, and Zedd for May 2026.' Newly renovated competitive threat.
